title: gyrostachys autumnalis
intro: Gyrostachys autumnalis, also known as the autumnal Stachys, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, Gyrostachys autumnalis has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Gyrostachys autumnalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
